Box #9—Switch Gears
v1.01 (c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc Published by Marketing Rebel LLC
Idea Power by David L. Deutsch
MarketingRebelClub.com/marketing-rebel-courses/idea-power/
Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures / Adventure #5—Box #9 Switch Gears
*What might you slow down to help the situation? What might you speed up?
What might you slow down to help the situation? What might you speed up?
You often see more when you slow things down. And you can sometimes accomplish
more when you speed things up. Often, a lot more! Remember to keep an open mind
about the possibility of changing tempos. You might be surprised at what it’s possible
to do faster––or what you should do slower. And don’t overlook changing the pace or
tempo—in writing, in speaking, in videos—which can also lead to new ideas and new
ways of doing things.
*Can it help to do more of something? Less of something?
Try taking an idea to the ultimate extreme, one way or another, and see what happens. It’s
like a balance scale. You may add a little bit more weight each time and nothing seems to
be happening––but then, suddenly, the balance tips. Same goes adding onto an idea or
situation. Or adding (or subtracting) more and more. See where the scales tip in your favor,
or where the right balance lies.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
